ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_company" TEXT /* Insurance company associated with the policy */,
  "installment_term" INTEGER /* Length of policy installment term in months */,
  "billing_code" TEXT /* Billing code for policy payments */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment for the policy */,
  "reinstatement_fee_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if a reinstatement fee applies (Y/N) */,
  "zip_code_garaging_location" TEXT /* ZIP code for the location where the vehicle is garaged */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "policy_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy expires */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Current status of the policy (e.g., Active, Inactive, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the vehicle */,
  "territory" INTEGER /* Territory where the vehicle is located */,
  "make_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle make */,
  "make_description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle make */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance level of the vehicle */,
  "new_cost_amount" REAL /* New cost amount of the vehicle */,
  "symbol" INTEGER /* Symbol code for the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "vehicle_use" TEXT /* Primary use of the vehicle (e.g., Personal, Commercial) */,
  "annual_mileage" INTEGER /* Average annual mileage of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number", "symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_usage" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with vehicle usage */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle usage (e.g., Business, Pleasure) */,
  "miles_to_work" INTEGER /* Miles driven to work each day */,
  "days_driven_per_week" INTEGER /* Average number of days driven per week */,
  "annual_miles" INTEGER /* Total annual miles driven */,
  "business_use_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of business use for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number", "usage_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the vehicle's features */,
  "anti_theft_device" TEXT /* Indicates if an anti-theft device is installed */,
  "passive_restraint" TEXT /* Indicates if the vehicle has passive restraints */,
  "airbags" TEXT /* Type and number of airbags installed in the vehicle */,
  "alarm_system" TEXT /* Type of alarm system installed in the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_statistics" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the drivers */,
  "total_drivers" INTEGER /* Total number of drivers on the policy */,
  "total_male" INTEGER /* Total number of male drivers */,
  "total_female" INTEGER /* Total number of female drivers */,
  "total_single" INTEGER /* Total number of single drivers */,
  "total_married" INTEGER /* Total number of married drivers */,
  "average_driver_age" REAL /* Average age of all drivers on the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_demographics" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the driver demographics */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age of drivers */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age of drivers */,
  "total_teenagers" INTEGER /* Total number of teenage drivers (15-19 years) */,
  "total_college_ages" INTEGER /* Total number of college-aged drivers (20-23 years) */,
  "total_young_adults" INTEGER /* Total number of young adult drivers (24-29 years) */,
  "driver_education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the drivers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the driver */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the driver */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the driver */,
  "years_of_driving_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_policy_number FOREIGN KEY ("policy_number") REFERENCES policies ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_limits" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the coverage limits */,
  "med_pay_limit" REAL /* Medical payment limit for the policy */,
  "bodily_injury_limit" REAL /* Bodily injury limit for the policy */,
  "physical_damage_limit" REAL /* Physical damage limit for the policy */,
  "comprehensive_coverage_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if comprehensive coverage applies (Y/N) */,
  "collision_coverage_limit" REAL /* Collision coverage limit for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "collision_coverage" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the collision coverage */,
  "collision_coverage_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if collision coverage is included (Y/N) */,
  "collision_deductible" INTEGER /* Deductible for collision coverage */,
  "collision_coverage_limit" REAL /* Limit of collision coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "eea_details" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with EEA coverage */,
  "liability_coverage_only_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if liability coverage only applies (Y/N) */,
  "multi_auto_policies_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if multiple auto policies are included (Y/N) */,
  "zip_code_3" TEXT /* ZIP code of the policy area */,
  "eea_coverage_limit" REAL /* Limit of EEA coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_tenure" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the tenure */,
  "tenure_years" INTEGER /* Number of years the policy has been active */,
  "agency_type" TEXT /* Type of agency managing the policy */,
  "policy_renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_renewals" (
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with renewal status */,
  "renewed_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if the policy has been renewed (Y/N) */,
  "new_business_indicator" TEXT /* Indicates if this is a new business policy (Y/N) */,
  "annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium amount for the policy */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was renewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was filed */,
  "claim_type" TEXT /* Type of claim (e.g., Collision, Comprehensive) */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., Pending, Approved, Rejected) */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_number FOREIGN KEY ("policy_number") REFERENCES policies ("policy_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Agent, Policyholder) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_policy_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID with access to the policy */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number associated with the access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted to the user (e.g., Read-only, Edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "policy_number")
)
